emails.subject: ETS State Government Affairs Report
emails.body: ETS State Government Affairs Report What do we know about this? Has the CPUC then opened a formal investigation into the gas infrastructure issue? I00-11-022 Investigation of SoCalGas' SDG&E's gas transmission system adequacy Prehearing conference May 17

emails.subject: Re: ETS State Government Affairs Report
emails.body: Re: ETS State Government Affairs Report Yes (sort of). I'm in Houston. Up on 47. What's up?

emails.subject: Re: ETS State Government Affairs Report
emails.body: Re: ETS State Government Affairs Report Yes (sort of). I'm in Houston. Up on 47. What's up?

emails.subject: ETS State Government Affairs Report
emails.body: Sorry. I sorta had a brain fart. I'd forgotten the San Diego "firm" problem. Mark sent me a note and reminded me what preciptated the opening of the proceeding. I guess the real question is what will the CPUC do to go forward? How will it combine the investigation with the information it picked up at the workshop? Are you planning on going to the prehearing conference on May 17? You got tIme to go down and drink some Starbucks tomorrow? To: Fawcett, Jeffery
